headline: Top Analyst Reports for Netflix, Advanced Micro Devices and SAP
summary: Today's Research Daily features new research reports on 16 major stocks, including Netflix, Inc. (NFLX), Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) and SAP SE (SAP), as well as a micro-cap stock, MIND Technology, Inc. (MIND).

headline: Global X Launches NYSE® 100 ETF Tracking Top Technology and Tech-Enabled Growth Companies
summary: Global X Management Company LLC ("Global X"), the New York-based provider of exchange-traded funds (ETFs), today announced the launch of the Global X NYSE® 100 ETF (NYSX) (the "Fund"). Premiering on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), the Fund provides targeted exposure to 100 technology and tech-enabled growth companies listed in the U.S.

headline: NYSE Lists Global X NYSE® 100 ETF, Expanding Access to Tech-Enabled Growth Companies
summary: NEW YORK, March 26, 2026--The NYSE listed the Global X NYSE® 100 ETF (NYSX), allowing investors to participate in the performance of the NYSE 100 Index.

headline: A Look At Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Valuation As NYSE Partners With Securitize On Tokenized Securities System
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) is in focus after the New York Stock Exchange agreed to work with Securitize on a digital transfer agent system, with the goal of supporting tokenized stocks and ETFs within existing market infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Intercontinental Exchange. The tokenization partnership comes after a busy period for Intercontinental Exchange, with AI powered mortgage servicing tools and new private credit data services also in focus. headline: Prediction market bets on sports, election, war would be verboten under new legislation
summary: Lawmakers have introduced a flurry of measures to rein-in prediction markets in recent weeks, as the platforms have come under increased scrutiny.
